name: Comparing Numbers? – Quick Math Game
description: Test your math skills in this fun and fast number comparison game! Look at the numbers and decide which one is greater, smaller, or equal. Tap the correct symbol (> , < , =) before the timer runs out. The game becomes faster and more challenging as your score increases. Perfect for kids and anyone who loves quick brain puzzles!
instructions: Mouse click or tap the correct symbol gt lt to answer
